title: cancrinia urgutensis
side_effects: Cancrinia urgutensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to nausea, vomiting, and even liver damage. Long-term use or high doses of Cancrinia urgutensis can also cause cardiovascular problems, including increased heart rate and blood pressure. Furthermore, improper use of the plant can interact with medications and exacerbate underlying health conditions, such as diabetes and high blood pressure.
